title.en: IEEE 802.15.7 Foundations: Scope, Vocabulary, and the Big Picture of Optical Wireless
title.zh: IEEE 802.15.7 基础导览：标准范围、术语词汇与光无线通信全景

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.15.7-2018 is the standard behind LiFi and visible light communication (VLC). Instead of radio, it sends data by flickering light sources — LEDs and laser diodes (LDs) — faster than your eye can follow (Clause 4.1). This lesson is your guided tour of the three orientation clauses: Clause 1 tells you what the standard is for, Clause 3 defines the vocabulary, and Clause 4 paints the whole architecture before later clauses drill into details. Think of it as the map you keep open while exploring the rest of the standard.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.15.7-2018 是 LiFi 与可见光通信（VLC）背后的标准。它不用无线电，而是让光源——发光二极管（LED）和激光二极管（LD）——以快于人眼可察觉的速度闪烁来传输数据（第 4.1 条）。本课带你走过三个总览性条款：第 1 条说明标准的用途，第 3 条定义术语词汇，第 4 条在后续条款深入细节之前先勾勒出整体架构。可以把它当作探索标准其余部分时随时打开的地图。

blocks.en: Clause 1.1 (Scope) pins down exactly what is being standardized: a physical layer (PHY — the bit-to-light layer) and a medium access control (MAC) sublayer (the layer that decides who transmits when) for short-range optical wireless communications (OWC) in transparent media, using wavelengths from 10 000 nm down to 190 nm — far beyond just visible light. It targets data rates good enough for audio and video, handles link mobility and ambient-light noise, and even covers camera-based reception where a digital image sensor is the receiver. Clause 1.2 (Purpose) is the 'why': OWC opens hundreds of terahertz of unlicensed spectrum, is immune to and does not interfere with radio-frequency (RF) systems, lets a user literally see the visible-light channel as a security cue, and rides on top of light you already use for illumination, displays, and signage.
blocks.zh: 第 1.1 条（范围）精确界定了标准化的对象：用于透明介质中短距离光无线通信（OWC）的物理层（PHY，即比特到光的转换层）与介质访问控制（MAC）子层（决定谁在何时发送的层），波长范围从 10 000 nm 一直到 190 nm，远不止可见光。它面向足以承载音频和视频的数据率，处理链路移动性与环境光噪声，甚至涵盖以数字图像传感器作为接收端的摄像头接收方式。第 1.2 条（目的）回答了“为什么”：OWC 开放了数百太赫兹的免许可频谱，对射频（RF）系统既免疫又不干扰，使用户能直接“看见”可见光信道作为一种安全提示，并且复用人们已在使用的照明、显示与标牌等光源。

blocks.en: Clause 3 is the dictionary you will lean on constantly. Clause 3.1 (Definitions) explains the OWC-specific words: dimming (reducing a transmitting light's radiant power), an idle pattern (a duty-cycle pattern that changes brightness for dimming support), the modulation-domain spectrum (the spectrum seen at the receiver's photodetector output), color stabilization (a control loop that keeps a color-shift-keying transmitter's color steady), and the color visibility dimming (CVD) frame (a frame used for color, visibility, and dimming support). Clause 3.2 (Acronyms and abbreviations) is the master expansion list — every short form you meet later, from OOK (ON-OFF keying) and VPPM (variable pulse position modulation) to CSK (color-shift keying), OCC (optical camera communications), and OWPAN (optical wireless personal area network), is spelled out there.
blocks.zh: 第 3 条是你将不断查阅的词典。第 3.1 条（定义）解释 OWC 专有词汇：调光（dimming，降低发射光的辐射功率）、空闲图案（idle pattern，一种通过占空比变化改变亮度以支持调光的图案）、调制域频谱（modulation-domain spectrum，在接收端光电探测器输出处观察到的频谱）、颜色稳定（color stabilization，使色移键控发射机颜色保持稳定的控制环路），以及颜色可见性调光（CVD）帧（用于颜色、可见性与调光支持的帧）。第 3.2 条（缩略语）是缩写总表——你后面遇到的每个缩写，从 OOK（开关键控）、VPPM（可变脉冲位置调制），到 CSK（色移键控）、OCC（光学摄像头通信）和 OWPAN（光无线个域网），都在这里展开。

blocks.en: Anchor acronyms: OWC = optical wireless communications; OWPAN = optical wireless personal area network (the network this standard builds); PHY = physical layer; MAC = medium access control; LED / LD = light-emitting diode / laser diode (the transmitters); photodetector = the receiver that turns light back into a signal. Lock these in and the rest of Clause 4 reads smoothly.
blocks.zh: 先记住几个核心缩写：OWC = 光无线通信；OWPAN = 光无线个域网（本标准所构建的网络）；PHY = 物理层；MAC = 介质访问控制；LED / LD = 发光二极管 / 激光二极管（发射端）；photodetector（光电探测器）= 把光重新转换为信号的接收端。记牢这些，第 4 条的其余部分就会读起来顺畅。

blocks.en: Clause 4.2 (Network topologies) sorts devices into three classes — infrastructure (fixed, mains-powered, intense light), mobile (battery-limited, weak light), and vehicle — and maps them onto three topologies. In star topology (Clause 4.2.2), every device talks to one central coordinator; each star network picks a unique OWPAN identifier so it operates independently of neighbors. In peer-to-peer topology (Clause 4.2.1), any device can talk to any other in range, and one peer becomes the coordinator by default (e.g., the first to speak). In broadcast topology (Clause 4.2.3), a device just transmits one-way to listeners without forming a network at all — no destination address needed. Across all three, devices carry a unique 64-bit address and may be given a short 16-bit address once associated.
blocks.zh: 第 4.2 条（网络拓扑）把设备分为三类——基础设施（infrastructure，固定、市电供电、光强大）、移动（mobile，电池受限、光弱）和车载（vehicle）——并将它们映射到三种拓扑。在星型拓扑（第 4.2.2 条）中，每个设备都与一个中心协调器（coordinator）通信；每个星型网络选取一个唯一的 OWPAN 标识符，从而独立于相邻网络运行。在点对点拓扑（第 4.2.1 条）中，覆盖范围内的任意设备可与任意其他设备通信，其中一个对等方默认成为协调器（例如最先发言者）。在广播拓扑（第 4.2.3 条）中，设备只是单向地向监听者发送，根本不组建网络——无需目的地址。在这三种拓扑中，设备都带有唯一的 64 位地址，关联后还可被分配一个 16 位短地址。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  subgraph Star["Star (4.2.2)"]
    C((Coordinator)) --- D1[Device]
    C --- D2[Device]
  end
  subgraph P2P["Peer-to-peer (4.2.1)"]
    A[Peer/Coord] --- B[Peer]
  end
  subgraph BC["Broadcast (4.2.3)"]
    T[Transmitter] -->|one-way| R1[Listener]
    T -->|one-way| R2[Listener]
  end
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  subgraph Star["星型 (4.2.2)"]
    C((协调器)) --- D1[设备]
    C --- D2[设备]
  end
  subgraph P2P["点对点 (4.2.1)"]
    A[对等/协调] --- B[对等]
  end
  subgraph BC["广播 (4.2.3)"]
    T[发送端] -->|单向| R1[监听者]
    T -->|单向| R2[监听者]
  end

blocks.en: Clause 4.3 (Modulation-domain spectrum) gives the key trick for sensing the channel optically. Because an illumination light source is 'always on', the photodetector output sits at DC (direct current) while idle. The moment data modulation starts at time t = T1, the spectrum splits into a DC component plus a modulation spectral line (Fm) — and watching for that line is how a device performs clear channel assessment (CCA), i.e., checking whether the medium is busy. Clause 4.4 (Architecture) then lays out the layered model: an OWPAN device has a PHY (the light transceiver) and a MAC sublayer, with upper layers (network and application) and a logical link control (LLC) layer reaching the MAC through a service-specific convergence sublayer (SSCS). A device management entity (DME) bridges the PHY and MAC management entities (PLME and MLME) to a dimmer, and a PHY switch routes to one or more optical cells through the optical service access point (SAP).
blocks.zh: 第 4.3 条（调制域频谱）给出了光学感知信道的关键技巧。由于照明光源是“常亮”的，空闲时光电探测器输出停留在直流（DC）。一旦在时刻 t = T1 开始数据调制，频谱便分裂为直流分量加上一条调制谱线（Fm）——通过监测这条谱线，设备就能进行空闲信道评估（CCA），即判断介质是否繁忙。第 4.4 条（架构）随后给出分层模型：一个 OWPAN 设备包含 PHY（光收发器）和 MAC 子层，上层（网络层与应用层）以及逻辑链路控制（LLC）层经由业务特定汇聚子层（SSCS）接入 MAC。设备管理实体（DME）把 PHY 与 MAC 的管理实体（PLME 与 MLME）桥接到调光器（dimmer），而 PHY 开关（PHY switch）经光业务接入点（SAP）路由到一个或多个光学小区。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 230" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="20" y="15" width="200" height="26"/><text x="30" y="33" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">Upper layers (network + application)</text><rect x="20" y="48" width="200" height="24"/><text x="30" y="64" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">LLC</text><rect x="20" y="79" width="200" height="24"/><text x="30" y="95" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">SSCS</text><rect x="20" y="110" width="200" height="28"/><text x="30" y="128" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">MAC (MCPS-SAP / MLME-SAP)</text><rect x="20" y="145" width="200" height="28"/><text x="30" y="163" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">PHY (PD-SAP / PLME-SAP)</text><rect x="20" y="180" width="200" height="28"/><text x="30" y="198" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">PHY switch -> optical SAP</text><rect x="260" y="95" width="110" height="48"/><text x="272" y="116" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">DME</text><text x="272" y="132" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">to dimmer</text><line x1="220" y1="124" x2="260" y2="119"/><line x1="220" y1="159" x2="260" y2="119"/><rect x="260" y="180" width="180" height="28"/><text x="272" y="198" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">optical media: cells #1..#n</text><line x1="220" y1="194" x2="260" y2="194"/></svg>

caption.en: Clause 4.4 OWPAN device stack: upper layers reach the MAC through LLC + SSCS; the PHY drives a PHY switch to one or more optical cells, while the DME ties PLME/MLME management to a dimmer.
caption.zh: 第 4.4 条 OWPAN 设备协议栈：上层经 LLC + SSCS 接入 MAC；PHY 驱动 PHY 开关连接一个或多个光学小区，而 DME 将 PLME/MLME 管理与调光器关联。

blocks.en: Inside the architecture, Clause 4.4.1 (PHY types) names six flavors: PHY I (outdoor, low rate, OOK/VPPM), PHY II (indoor, tens of Mbps), PHY III (color-shift keying with multiple light sources), and PHY IV/V/VI for camera-based optical camera communications (OCC) using discrete sources, diffuse surfaces, and video displays. A subtle rule: for the OCC PHYs (IV/V/VI), over-the-air frame configuration is forbidden — settings come only from the PHY information base (PHY PIB), because camera data rates can't afford configuration overhead. Clause 4.4.2 (MAC sublayer) exposes two service access points: the MCPS-SAP for data and the MLME-SAP for management, and bundles beacon management, channel access, frame validation, acknowledgments, association/disassociation, plus color, visibility, and dimming support. Clause 4.4.3 (Dimming and flicker-mitigation support) ensures the light still looks steady: flicker is brightness fluctuation faster than the eye can track, bounded by the maximum flickering time period (MFTP), and it is split into intraframe (within a frame) and interframe (between frames) flicker, each mitigated by run-length-limited (RLL) coding, modulation choice, or matched idle patterns.
blocks.zh: 在架构内部，第 4.4.1 条（PHY 类型）列出六种：PHY I（户外、低速率、OOK/VPPM）、PHY II（室内、数十 Mbps）、PHY III（采用多光源的色移键控），以及面向摄像头光学通信（OCC）的 PHY IV/V/VI，分别使用离散光源、漫射面与视频显示器。一条微妙规则：对于 OCC 类 PHY（IV/V/VI），禁止空中帧配置——配置只能来自 PHY 信息库（PHY PIB），因为摄像头数据率无法承受配置开销。第 4.4.2 条（MAC 子层）暴露两个业务接入点：用于数据的 MCPS-SAP 和用于管理的 MLME-SAP，并整合了信标管理、信道接入、帧校验、确认、关联/解除关联，以及颜色、可见性和调光支持。第 4.4.3 条（调光与抖动抑制支持）确保光看起来仍然稳定：闪烁（flicker）是快于人眼跟踪能力的亮度波动，受最大闪烁时间周期（MFTP）约束，并分为帧内（intraframe）与帧间（interframe）两类，分别通过游程受限（RLL）编码、调制方式选择或匹配的空闲图案来抑制。

blocks.en: Clause 4.5 (Functional overview) sketches how the MAC actually moves data. Clause 4.5.1 (Superframe structure) describes an optional beacon-bounded superframe split into a beacon period (BP), a contention access period (CAP), and an optional contention-free period (CFP) of guaranteed time slots (GTSs) for low-latency traffic. Clause 4.5.2 (Data transfer model) defines three transactions: to a coordinator, from a coordinator, and peer-to-peer — and notes that beacon-enabled networks add synchronization while non-beacon ones simply transmit. Clause 4.5.3 (Clock-rate selection) allows multiple and even asymmetric optical clock rates between transmitter and receiver. Clause 4.5.4 (Frame structure) lists five frame types: beacon, data, acknowledgment, MAC command, and the CVD frame. Clause 4.5.5 (Improving probability of successful delivery) combines three tools: a random access mechanism (4.5.5.1, with optional CSMA/CA — carrier sense multiple access with collision avoidance), frame acknowledgment (4.5.5.2), and data verification (4.5.5.3) via a cyclic redundancy check (CRC).
blocks.zh: 第 4.5 条（功能概述）勾勒 MAC 如何实际搬运数据。第 4.5.1 条（超帧结构）描述了一个可选的、由信标界定的超帧，划分为信标期（BP）、竞争接入期（CAP）和可选的无竞争期（CFP），后者由面向低时延业务的保证时隙（GTS）构成。第 4.5.2 条（数据传输模型）定义三类事务：向协调器、从协调器、以及点对点——并指出启用信标的网络增加了同步，而非信标网络则直接发送。第 4.5.3 条（时钟速率选择）允许收发两端使用多种甚至非对称的光时钟速率。第 4.5.4 条（帧结构）列出五种帧类型：信标帧、数据帧、确认帧、MAC 命令帧和 CVD 帧。第 4.5.5 条（提升成功投递概率）结合三种手段：随机接入机制（4.5.5.1，可选 CSMA/CA——载波侦听多址/冲突避免）、帧确认（4.5.5.2），以及通过循环冗余校验（CRC）的数据校验（4.5.5.3）。

summary.en: Coverage map: Security (4.6), Primitives (4.7), PHY-specific access (4.8), Decoding (4.9) — exact clause anchors
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：安全（4.6）、原语（4.7）、按 PHY 的接入（4.8）、解码（4.9）——精确条款锚点

blocks.en: Clause 4.6 (Security): because light does not pass through walls, the threat model differs from RF, but the standard still offers symmetric-key services — data confidentiality, data authenticity, and replay protection — selectable per frame, using a link key (two peers) or a group key (a group). Key establishment is left to higher layers. Clause 4.7 (Concept of primitives): services between layers are modeled as service primitives crossing a SAP, in four generic types — request (start a service), confirm (report results of prior requests), indication (signal an internal event upward), and response (complete a procedure begun by an indication). Clause 4.8 (Some media access mechanisms by PHY types): several transmitter schemes use unslotted ALOHA — meaning 'send whenever you have a packet', no beacon and no listen-before-talk — including UFSOOK (undersampled frequency shift ON-OFF keying), Twinkle VPPM, Offset-VPWM (offset variable pulse width modulation), MPM (mirror pulse modulation), VTASC (variable transparent amplitude-shape-color), SS2DC (sequential scalable two-dimensional color), and IDE (invisible data embedding); their superframe is CAP-only. Clause 4.9 (Decoding): the standard specifies how to build and send PHY/MAC frames, but how a receiver decodes them is explicitly outside the normative scope — implementers are free to choose. This deepdive, together with the prose above, gives every one of the lesson's 21 units a home.
blocks.zh: 第 4.6 条（安全）：由于光不穿墙，其威胁模型不同于 RF，但标准仍提供对称密钥服务——数据机密性、数据真实性与重放保护——可按帧选择，使用链路密钥（两个对等方）或组密钥（一组设备）；密钥建立交由上层处理。第 4.7 条（原语概念）：层间服务被建模为跨越 SAP 的服务原语，共四种通用类型——请求（request，启动服务）、确认（confirm，报告先前请求的结果）、指示（indication，向上层告知内部事件）和响应（response，完成由指示发起的过程）。第 4.8 条（按 PHY 类型的若干介质接入机制）：若干发射方案采用非时隙 ALOHA——即“有包就发”，无信标、无先听后说——包括 UFSOOK（欠采样频移开关键控）、Twinkle VPPM、Offset-VPWM（偏移可变脉宽调制）、MPM（镜像脉冲调制）、VTASC（可变透明幅度-形状-颜色）、SS2DC（顺序可缩放二维颜色）和 IDE（隐形数据嵌入）；其超帧仅含 CAP。第 4.9 条（解码）：标准规定了如何构造与发送 PHY/MAC 帧，但接收端如何解码明确不在规范范围内——实现者可自由选择。本深入解读连同上文的正文，为本课全部 21 个单元各自找到了归宿。

blocks.en: Reading the standard as a beginner: start with Clause 1 (what + why), keep Clause 3 open as your glossary, and treat Clause 4 as the table of contents in prose — each subclause ends with a pointer ('described in 5.x') to the normative detail. Master Clause 4 and you can navigate the other 13 clauses without getting lost.
blocks.zh: 作为初学者阅读本标准的建议：从第 1 条入手（是什么 + 为什么），把第 3 条当作随时翻阅的术语表，并把第 4 条视为散文形式的目录——每个子条款末尾都有指向规范细节的指针（“见 5.x”）。掌握第 4 条，你便能在其余 13 个条款中游刃有余、不致迷失。
